content.text: Itanagar, the capital city of Arunachal Pradesh, is a vibrant destination nestled in the Eastern Himalayas. The city boasts a unique blend of natural beauty, rich cultural heritage, and traditional architecture. To plan your visit, the best time would be during the spring or autumn months when the weather is pleasant and mild.
